sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_b8aba21d05d803107f44b15d9b674725
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.SpokeWebhookUtil</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>SpokeWebhookUtil</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var SpokeWebhookUtil = Class.create();
SpokeWebhookUtil.prototype = Object.extendsObject(AbstractAjaxProcessor, {

	/**
	 * Registry mapping provider names to their Script Include class names and
	 * the config keys each one requires.
	 * Add new providers here without touching forwardEvent or _getDelegate.
	 */
	REGISTRY: {
		docusign: {
			scriptInclude : 'DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil',
			requiredConfig: ['instanceUrl', 'clientId', 'clientSecret', 'username', 'password']
		},
		github: {
			scriptInclude : 'GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil',
			requiredConfig: ['instanceUrl', 'sharedSecret']
		}
	},

	/**
	 * Supports two calling conventions:
	 *   Direct:    new SpokeWebhookUtil(providerStr, configObj)
	 *   GlideAjax: instantiated by the platform as new SpokeWebhookUtil(request, response, processor)
	 *
	 * @param {string|Object} provider - Provider name for direct use; platform request object for GlideAjax.
	 * @param {Object}        config   - Config object for direct use; platform response object for GlideAjax.
	 */
	initialize: function(provider, config) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Starting initialization');
		if (typeof provider === 'string' || !provider) {
			// Direct instantiation: new SpokeWebhookUtil('docusign', { ... })
			this.fProvider = (provider || '').toLowerCase();
			this.fConfig   = config || {};
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Direct instantiation with provider: ' + this.fProvider);
		} else {
			// GlideAjax invocation: platform passes (request, response, processor)
			global.AbstractAjaxProcessor.prototype.initialize.call(this, provider, config);
			this.fProvider = '';
			this.fConfig   = {};
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: GlideAjax instantiation');
		}
		this.fDelegate = null;
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Initialization completed');
	},

	/**
	 * GlideAjax entry point — invoked when a client script calls:
	 *   var ga = new GlideAjax('SpokeWebhookUtil');
	 *   ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'ajaxForwardEvent');
	 *
	 * Expected sysparm_* parameters:
	 *   sysparm_provider           'docusign' | 'github'
	 *   sysparm_payload            JSON string
	 *   sysparm_instanceUrl        Target instance URL (both providers)
	 *   sysparm_clientId           DocuSign only
	 *   sysparm_clientSecret       DocuSign only
	 *   sysparm_username           DocuSign only
	 *   sysparm_password           DocuSign only
	 *   sysparm_sharedSecret       GitHub only
	 *   sysparm_eventType          GitHub only
	 *   sysparm_hookId             GitHub only (optional)
	 *   sysparm_additionalHeaders  JSON object string (optional, both providers)
	 *
	 * Returns an XML item: <result answer="<JSON string>"/>.
	 * The JSON structure matches the forwardEvent return shape.
	 */
	ajaxForwardEvent: function() {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - ajaxForwardEvent: Starting AJAX forward event');
		var providerParam = (this.getParameter('sysparm_provider') || '') + '';
		var payload  =  (this.getParameter('sysparm_payload')  || '') + '';
		var config   = {};
		var options  = {};
		var result;
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - ajaxForwardEvent: Provider: ' + typeof providerParam);
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - ajaxForwardEvent: Payload: ' + typeof payload);

		if (providerParam === "docusign") {
			config = {
				instanceUrl  : this.getParameter('sysparm_instanceUrl')   || '',
				clientId     : this.getParameter('sysparm_clientId')      || '',
				clientSecret : this.getParameter('sysparm_clientSecret')  || '',
				username     : this.getParameter('sysparm_username')      || '',
				password     : this.getParameter('sysparm_password')      || ''
			};
			var dsHdrs = this.getParameter('sysparm_additionalHeaders');
			if (dsHdrs) {
				try { options.additionalHeaders = JSON.parse(dsHdrs); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
			}
		}
		else if (providerParam.toString() == "github") {
			config = {
				instanceUrl  : this.getParameter('sysparm_instanceUrl')  || '',
				sharedSecret : this.getParameter('sysparm_sharedSecret') || ''
			};
			options.eventType = this.getParameter('sysparm_eventType') || '';
			options.hookId    = this.getParameter('sysparm_hookId')    || '';
			var ghHdrs = this.getParameter('sysparm_additionalHeaders');
			if (ghHdrs) {
				try { options.additionalHeaders = JSON.parse(ghHdrs); } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
			}

		} else {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - ajaxForwardEvent: ERROR - Unknown provider: ' + providerParam);
			result = {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : new GlideDateTime().getValue(),
				errorCode   : 'UNKNOWN_PROVIDER',
				errorMessage: 'Unknown provider "' + providerParam + '". Expected "docusign" or "github".'
			};
			this.newItem('result').setAttribute('answer', JSON.stringify(result));
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - ajaxForwardEvent: Completed with error');
			return;
		}

		var util = new global.SpokeWebhookUtil(providerParam, config);
		result = util.forwardEvent(payload, options);
		this.newItem('result').setAttribute('answer', JSON.stringify(result));
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - ajaxForwardEvent: Completed successfully');
	},

	/**
	 * Validates the provider name and required config keys, then lazily instantiates
	 * the correct delegate Script Include. The delegate is cached after first call.
	 *
	 * @private
	 * @returns {{
	 *   success     : boolean,
	 *   delegate    : Object|null,
	 *   errorCode   : string|null,
	 *   errorMessage: string|null
	 * }}
	 */
	_getDelegate: function() {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: Starting delegate retrieval for provider: ' + this.fProvider);
		if (this.fDelegate) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: Returning cached delegate');
			return { success: true, delegate: this.fDelegate, errorCode: null, errorMessage: null };
		}
		if (!this.REGISTRY[this.fProvider]) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: ERROR - Unknown provider: ' + this.fProvider);
			return {
				success     : false,
				delegate    : null,
				errorCode   : 'UNKNOWN_PROVIDER',
				errorMessage: 'Unknown provider "' + this.fProvider + '".'
								+ ' Registered providers: ' + Object.keys(this.REGISTRY).join(', ')
			};
		}
		var entry   = this.REGISTRY[this.fProvider];
		var missing = [];
		for (var i = 0; i < entry.requiredConfig.length; i++) {
			var key = entry.requiredConfig[i];
			if (!this.fConfig[key]) {
				missing.push(key);
			}
		}
		if (missing.length > 0) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: ERROR - Missing config keys: ' + missing.join(', '));
			return {
				success     : false,
				delegate    : null,
				errorCode   : 'MISSING_CONFIG',
				errorMessage: 'Provider "' + this.fProvider + '" requires config keys: '
								+ entry.requiredConfig.join(', ')
								+ '. Missing: ' + missing.join(', ')
			};
		}
		var c = this.fConfig;
		switch (this.fProvider) {
			case 'docusign':
				gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: Creating DocuSign delegate');
				this.fDelegate = new global.DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil(
					c.instanceUrl, c.clientId, c.clientSecret, c.username, c.password
				);
				break;
			case 'github':
				gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: Creating GitHub delegate');
				this.fDelegate = new global.GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil(c.instanceUrl, c.sharedSecret);
				break;
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - _getDelegate: Delegate created successfully');
		return { success: true, delegate: this.fDelegate, errorCode: null, errorMessage: null };
	},

	/**
	 * Forwards a webhook event payload to the appropriate Spoke external trigger.
	 * Provider-specific options are passed through to the delegate's forwardEvent.
	 *
	 * Error codes (own, before delegating):
	 *   UNKNOWN_PROVIDER - provider name is not in the registry
	 *   MISSING_CONFIG   - required config keys absent for the resolved provider
	 *
	 * Plus any error codes from the delegate (see each Script Include's forwardEvent JSDoc).
	 *
	 * Options per provider:
	 *   DocuSign: { additionalHeaders? }
	 *   GitHub:   { eventType, hookId?, additionalHeaders? }
	 *
	 * @param {string} payload   - JSON string of the webhook payload
	 * @param {Object} [options] - Provider-specific options
	 * @returns {{
	 *   success     : boolean,
	 *   statusCode  : number,
	 *   responseBody: string|null,
	 *   timestamp   : string,
	 *   errorCode   : string|null,
	 *   errorMessage: string|null
	 * }}
	 */
	forwardEvent: function(payload, options) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Starting event forwarding for provider: ' + this.fProvider);
		var opts = options || {};

		var delegateResult = this._getDelegate();
		if (!delegateResult.success) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Failed to get delegate: ' + delegateResult.errorMessage);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : new GlideDateTime().getValue(),
				errorCode   : delegateResult.errorCode,
				errorMessage: delegateResult.errorMessage
			};
		}

		var d = delegateResult.delegate;

		var result;
		switch (this.fProvider) {
			case 'docusign':
				gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Delegating to DocuSign handler');
				result = d.forwardEvent(payload, opts.additionalHeaders);
				break;
			case 'github':
				gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Delegating to GitHub handler');
				result = d.forwardEvent(payload, opts.eventType, opts.hookId, opts.additionalHeaders);
				break;
		}
		gs.info('CCL6454 - SpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Event forwarding completed with success: ' + result.success);
		return result;
	},

	type: 'SpokeWebhookUtil'
});
]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-16 09:11:00</sys_created_on><sys_id>b8aba21d05d803107f44b15d9b674725</sys_id><sys_mod_count>40</sys_mod_count><sys_name>SpokeWebhookUtil</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_b8aba21d05d803107f44b15d9b674725</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-20 13:16:50</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_1f8beed905d803107f44b15d9b674776
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<access>public</access>
<active>true</active>
<api_name>global.GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil</api_name>
<caller_access/>
<client_callable>false</client_callable>
<description/>
<mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable>
<name>GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil</name>
<sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable>
<script><![CDATA[var GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil = Class.create();
GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil.prototype = {

	SPOKE_PATH : '/api/sn_github_spoke/github_external_trigger?X-SkipCookieAuthentication=true',
	B64_CHARS  : 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789+/=',

	/**
	 * @param {string} instanceUrl  - Target SN instance base URL (trailing slash optional)
	 * @param {string} sharedSecret - GitHub webhook shared secret used for HMAC signing
	 */
	initialize: function(instanceUrl, sharedSecret) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Starting initialization');
		this.fInstanceUrl  = instanceUrl ? (instanceUrl + '').replace(/\/$/, '') : '';
		this.fSharedSecret = sharedSecret ? (sharedSecret + '') : '';
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Initialization completed for instance:   with parameters: instanceUrl: ' + this.fInstanceUrl + ", sharedSecret: " + this.fSharedSecret);
	},

	/**
	 * Validates that all required constructor arguments are present and non-empty.
	 * @private
	 * @returns {{ valid: boolean, errorMessage: string }}
	 */
	_validateConfig: function() {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _validateConfig: Starting config validation');
		var missing = [];
		if (!this.fInstanceUrl)  missing.push('instanceUrl');
		if (!this.fSharedSecret) missing.push('sharedSecret');

		if (missing.length > 0) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _validateConfig: ERROR - Missing config: ' + missing.join(', '));
			return {
				valid        : false,
				errorMessage : 'Missing required configuration: ' + missing.join(', ')
			};
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _validateConfig: Config validation successful');
		return { valid: true, errorMessage: '' };
	},

	/**
	 * Converts a base64 string to a lowercase hex string.
	 * Needed because GlideCertificateEncryption.generateMac returns base64,
	 * but GitHub's x-hub-signature-256 expects a hex digest.
	 * @private
	 * @param {string} b64
	 * @returns {string}
	 */
	_base64ToHex: function(b64) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _base64ToHex: Starting base64 to hex conversion');
		var chars = this.B64_CHARS;
		var hex   = '';
		var i     = 0;

		while (i < b64.length) {
			var enc1 = chars.indexOf(b64.charAt(i++));
			var enc2 = chars.indexOf(b64.charAt(i++));
			var enc3 = chars.indexOf(b64.charAt(i++));
			var enc4 = chars.indexOf(b64.charAt(i++));

			var byte1 = (enc1 << 2) | (enc2 >> 4);
			var byte2 = ((enc2 & 15) << 4) | (enc3 >> 2);
			var byte3 = ((enc3 & 3) << 6) | enc4;

			hex += ('0' + (byte1 & 0xff).toString(16)).slice(-2);
			if (enc3 !== 64) hex += ('0' + (byte2 & 0xff).toString(16)).slice(-2);
			if (enc4 !== 64) hex += ('0' + (byte3 & 0xff).toString(16)).slice(-2);
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _base64ToHex: Conversion completed');
		return hex;
	},

	/**
	 * Computes the HMAC-SHA256 signature of payload using the shared secret.
	 * GlideCertificateEncryption.generateMac requires a base64-encoded key and
	 * returns a base64 digest; this method converts the digest to hex for the
	 * x-hub-signature-256 header.
	 *
	 * Failure reasons:
	 *   - GlideCertificateEncryption throws (e.g. unsupported algorithm, bad key)
	 *   - _base64ToHex receives an unexpected value
	 *
	 * @private
	 * @param {string} payload - Raw JSON string to sign
	 * @returns {{
	 *   success     : boolean,
	 *   signature   : string|null,
	 *   errorCode   : string|null,
	 *   errorMessage: string|null
	 * }}
	 */
	_computeSignature: function(payload) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _computeSignature: Starting HMAC-SHA256 signature computation');
		try {
			var mac           = new GlideCertificateEncryption();
			var secretEncoded = GlideStringUtil.base64Encode(this.fSharedSecret);
			var sigBase64     = mac.generateMac(secretEncoded, 'HmacSHA256', payload);
			var sigHex        = this._base64ToHex(sigBase64);

			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _computeSignature: Signature computed successfully');
			return { success: true, signature: sigHex, errorCode: null, errorMessage: null };
		} catch (e) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - _computeSignature: ERROR - Signature computation failed: ' + e.message);
			return {
				success     : false,
				signature   : null,
				errorCode   : 'SIGNATURE_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'Failed to compute HMAC-SHA256 signature: ' + e.message
			};
		}
	},

	/**
	 * Forwards a GitHub webhook event to the Spoke external trigger endpoint.
	 *
	 * Error codes:
	 *   INVALID_CONFIG      - instanceUrl or sharedSecret is missing
	 *   INVALID_PAYLOAD     - payload is null, empty, or not a string
	 *   INVALID_EVENT_TYPE  - eventType is null or empty
	 *   SIGNATURE_ERROR     - HMAC computation threw an exception
	 *   SPOKE_REQUEST_ERROR - Network/transport failure during the Spoke call
	 *
	 * @param {string} payload               - JSON string of the GitHub webhook payload
	 * @param {string} eventType             - x-github-event value (e.g. 'release', 'push', 'pull_request')
	 * @param {string} [hookId]              - x-github-hook-id value; defaults to empty string
	 * @param {Object} [additionalHeaders]   - Additional headers merged into the Spoke request
	 *                                         e.g. { 'x-github-delivery': '<uuid>' }
	 * @returns {{
	 *   success     : boolean,
	 *   statusCode  : number,
	 *   responseBody: string|null,
	 *   timestamp   : string,
	 *   errorCode   : string|null,
	 *   errorMessage: string|null
	 * }}
	 */
	forwardEvent: function(payload, eventType, hookId, additionalHeaders) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Starting event forwarding for eventType: ' + eventType);
		var timestamp = new GlideDateTime().getValue();

		var configCheck = this._validateConfig();
		if (!configCheck.valid) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Invalid config: ' + configCheck.errorMessage);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'INVALID_CONFIG',
				errorMessage: configCheck.errorMessage
			};
		}

		if (!payload || typeof payload !== 'string') {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Invalid payload');
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'INVALID_PAYLOAD',
				errorMessage: 'payload must be a non-empty JSON string'
			};
		}

		if (!eventType) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Missing eventType');
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'INVALID_EVENT_TYPE',
				errorMessage: 'eventType is required (e.g. "release", "push", "pull_request")'
			};
		}

		var sigResult = this._computeSignature(payload);
		if (!sigResult.success) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Signature computation failed: ' + sigResult.errorMessage);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : sigResult.errorCode,
				errorMessage: sigResult.errorMessage
			};
		}

		var r = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
		r.setEndpoint(this.fInstanceUrl + this.SPOKE_PATH);
		r.setHttpMethod('post');
		r.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
		r.setRequestHeader('x-hub-signature-256', 'sha256=' + sigResult.signature);
		r.setRequestHeader('x-github-event',      eventType);
		r.setRequestHeader('x-github-hook-id',    hookId || '');

		if (additionalHeaders && typeof additionalHeaders === 'object') {
			for (var h in additionalHeaders) {
				if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(additionalHeaders, h)) {
					r.setRequestHeader(h, additionalHeaders[h]);
				}
			}
		}

		r.setRequestBody(payload);
		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Sending request to Spoke endpoint: ' + this.fInstanceUrl + this.SPOKE_PATH);

		var response, statusCode, responseBody;
		try {
			response     = r.execute();
			statusCode   = response.getStatusCode();
			responseBody = response.getBody();
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Spoke request completed with status: ' + statusCode);
		} catch (e) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Spoke request failed: ' + e.message);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'SPOKE_REQUEST_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'Network or transport error during Spoke call to '
				              + this.fInstanceUrl + this.SPOKE_PATH + ': ' + e.message
			};
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Event forwarding completed successfully');
		return {
			success     : true,
			statusCode  : statusCode,
			responseBody: responseBody,
			timestamp   : timestamp,
			errorCode   : null,
			errorMessage: null
		};
	},

	type: 'GitHubSpokeWebhookUtil'
};
]]></script>
<sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-04-16 09:10:09</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>1f8beed905d803107f44b15d9b674776</sys_id>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_866baa9d05d803107f44b15d9b674757
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<access>public</access>
<active>true</active>
<api_name>global.DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil</api_name>
<caller_access/>
<client_callable>false</client_callable>
<description/>
<mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable>
<name>DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil</name>
<sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable>
<script><![CDATA[var DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil = Class.create();
DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil.prototype = {

	TOKEN_PATH : '/oauth_token.do',
	SPOKE_PATH : '/api/sn_docusign_spoke/docusign_esignature_external_trigger?X-SkipCookieAuthentication=true',

	/**
	 * @param {string} instanceURL  - Target SN instance base URL (trailing slash optional)
	 * @param {string} clientId     - OAuth client ID
	 * @param {string} clientSecret - OAuth client secret
	 * @param {string} username     - SN username for password grant
	 * @param {string} password     - SN password for password grant
	 */
	initialize: function(instanceURL, clientId, clientSecret, username, password) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Starting initialization');
		this.fInstanceURL  = instanceURL ? (instanceURL + '').replace(/\/$/, '') : '';
		this.fClientId     = clientId ? (clientId + '') : '';
		this.fClientSecret = clientSecret ? (clientSecret + '') : '';
		this.fUsername     = username ? (username + '') : '';
		this.fPassword     = password ? (password + '') : '';
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - initialize: Initialization completed for instance: ' + this.fInstanceURL);
	},

	/**
	 * Validates that all required constructor arguments are present and non-empty.
	 * @private
	 * @returns {{ valid: boolean, errorMessage: string }}
	 */
	_validateConfig: function() {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _validateConfig: Starting config validation');
		var missing = [];
		if (!this.fInstanceURL)  missing.push('instanceURL');
		if (!this.fClientId)     missing.push('clientId');
		if (!this.fClientSecret) missing.push('clientSecret');
		if (!this.fUsername)     missing.push('username');
		if (!this.fPassword)     missing.push('password');

		if (missing.length > 0) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _validateConfig: ERROR - Missing config: ' + missing.join(', '));
			return {
				valid        : false,
				errorMessage : 'Missing required configuration: ' + missing.join(', ')
			};
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _validateConfig: Config validation successful');
		return { valid: true, errorMessage: '' };
	},

	/**
	 * Acquires a Bearer access token via OAuth 2.0 password grant from /oauth_token.do.
	 *
	 * Failure reasons:
	 *   - Network/transport exception during the request
	 *   - Non-200 HTTP response (e.g. 401 bad credentials, 404 wrong instanceURL)
	 *   - Response body is not parseable JSON
	 *   - Parsed response does not contain an access_token field
	 *
	 * @private
	 * @returns {{
	 *   success     : boolean,
	 *   accessToken : string|null,
	 *   statusCode  : number,
	 *   responseBody: string|null,
	 *   errorCode   : string|null,
	 *   errorMessage: string|null
	 * }}
	 */
	_acquireToken: function() {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: Starting OAuth token acquisition');
		var tokenR = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
		tokenR.setEndpoint(this.fInstanceURL + this.TOKEN_PATH);
		tokenR.setHttpMethod('post');
		tokenR.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
		tokenR.setRequestBody(
			'grant_type=password'
			+ '&client_id='     + encodeURIComponent(this.fClientId)
			+ '&client_secret=' + encodeURIComponent(this.fClientSecret)
			+ '&username='      + encodeURIComponent(this.fUsername)
			+ '&password='      + encodeURIComponent(this.fPassword)
		);
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: Sending token request to: ' + this.fInstanceURL + this.TOKEN_PATH);

		var tokenResponse, statusCode, body;
		try {
			tokenResponse = tokenR.execute();
			statusCode    = tokenResponse.getStatusCode();
			body          = tokenResponse.getBody();
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: Token request completed with status: ' + statusCode);
		} catch (e) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: ERROR - Token request failed: ' + e.message);
			return {
				success     : false,
				accessToken : null,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				errorCode   : 'TOKEN_REQUEST_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'Network or transport error during OAuth token request to '
				              + this.fInstanceURL + this.TOKEN_PATH + ': ' + e.message
			};
		}

		if (statusCode !== 200) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: ERROR - Non-200 status code: ' + statusCode);
			return {
				success     : false,
				accessToken : null,
				statusCode  : statusCode,
				responseBody: body,
				errorCode   : 'TOKEN_RESPONSE_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'OAuth token request returned HTTP ' + statusCode
				              + '. Verify instanceURL, clientId, and clientSecret.'
				              + ' Response: ' + body
			};
		}

		var tokenData;
		try {
			tokenData = JSON.parse(body);
		} catch (e) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: ERROR - Failed to parse token response: ' + e.message);
			return {
				success     : false,
				accessToken : null,
				statusCode  : statusCode,
				responseBody: body,
				errorCode   : 'TOKEN_PARSE_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'OAuth token response body is not valid JSON: ' + e.message
				              + '. Raw body: ' + body
			};
		}

		if (!tokenData.access_token) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: ERROR - No access_token in response');
			return {
				success     : false,
				accessToken : null,
				statusCode  : statusCode,
				responseBody: body,
				errorCode   : 'TOKEN_PARSE_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'OAuth token response did not contain an access_token field.'
				              + ' Response: ' + body
			};
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - _acquireToken: Token acquired successfully');
		return {
			success     : true,
			accessToken : tokenData.access_token,
			statusCode  : statusCode,
			responseBody: body,
			errorCode   : null,
			errorMessage: null
		};
	},

	/**
	 * Forwards a DocuSign envelope event to the Spoke external trigger endpoint.
	 *
	 * Error codes:
	 *   INVALID_CONFIG       - One or more required constructor args are missing
	 *   INVALID_PAYLOAD      - body is null, empty, or not a string
	 *   TOKEN_REQUEST_ERROR  - Network/transport failure during token acquisition
	 *   TOKEN_RESPONSE_ERROR - Non-200 response from /oauth_token.do
	 *   TOKEN_PARSE_ERROR    - Token response is not valid JSON or missing access_token
	 *   SPOKE_REQUEST_ERROR  - Network/transport failure during the Spoke call
	 *
	 * @param {string} body                - JSON string of the DocuSign webhook payload
	 * @param {Object} [additionalHeaders] - Additional headers merged into the Spoke request
	 *                                       e.g. { 'x-custom-header': 'value' }
	 * @returns {{
	 *   success     : boolean,
	 *   statusCode  : number,
	 *   responseBody: string|null,
	 *   timestamp   : string,
	 *   errorCode   : string|null,
	 *   errorMessage: string|null
	 * }}
	 */
	forwardEvent: function(body, additionalHeaders) {
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Starting event forwarding');
		var timestamp = new GlideDateTime().getValue();

		var configCheck = this._validateConfig();
		if (!configCheck.valid) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Invalid config: ' + configCheck.errorMessage);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'INVALID_CONFIG',
				errorMessage: configCheck.errorMessage
			};
		}

		if (!body || typeof body !== 'string') {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Invalid payload');
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'INVALID_PAYLOAD',
				errorMessage: 'body must be a non-empty JSON string'
			};
		}

		var tokenResult = this._acquireToken();
		if (!tokenResult.success) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Token acquisition failed: ' + tokenResult.errorMessage);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : tokenResult.statusCode,
				responseBody: tokenResult.responseBody,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : tokenResult.errorCode,
				errorMessage: tokenResult.errorMessage
			};
		}

		var r = new sn_ws.RESTMessageV2();
		r.setEndpoint(this.fInstanceURL + this.SPOKE_PATH);
		r.setHttpMethod('post');
		r.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json');
		r.setRequestHeader('Authorization', 'Bearer ' + tokenResult.accessToken);

		if (additionalHeaders && typeof additionalHeaders === 'object') {
			for (var h in additionalHeaders) {
				if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(additionalHeaders, h)) {
					r.setRequestHeader(h, additionalHeaders[h]);
				}
			}
		}

		r.setRequestBody(body);
		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Sending request to Spoke endpoint: ' + this.fInstanceURL + this.SPOKE_PATH);

		var response, statusCode, responseBody;
		try {
			response     = r.execute();
			statusCode   = response.getStatusCode();
			responseBody = response.getBody();
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Spoke request completed with status: ' + statusCode);
		} catch (e) {
			gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: ERROR - Spoke request failed: ' + e.message);
			return {
				success     : false,
				statusCode  : -1,
				responseBody: null,
				timestamp   : timestamp,
				errorCode   : 'SPOKE_REQUEST_ERROR',
				errorMessage: 'Network or transport error during Spoke call to '
				              + this.fInstanceURL + this.SPOKE_PATH + ': ' + e.message
			};
		}

		gs.info('CCL6454 - DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil - forwardEvent: Event forwarding completed successfully');
		return {
			success     : true,
			statusCode  : statusCode,
			responseBody: responseBody,
			timestamp   : timestamp,
			errorCode   : null,
			errorMessage: null
		};
	},

	type: 'DocuSignSpokeWebhookUtil'
};
]]></script>

'resp-ok' : 'resp-err'); if (ok) { statusEl.textContent = '\u2713 Success \u2014 HTTP ' + data.statusCode; } else { var label = '\u2717 ' + (data.errorCode || 'ERROR'); if (data.statusCode && data.statusCode !== -1) label += ' \u2014 HTTP ' + data.statusCode; statusEl.textContent = label; } bodyEl.textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2); section.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'nearest' }); } /* ── Init ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () { loadSample(); }); /* Public API (bound to onclick in HTML via whsim.*) */ return { switchProvider : switchProvider, loadSample : loadSample, formatJson : formatJson, minifyJson : minifyJson, send : send }; }()); ]]>Knowledge 2026 Lab CCL6454 — Spoke Webhook Simulator (GlideAjax variant). Proxy for DocuSign and GitHub to simulate signed/authenticated webhook events. Invokes SpokeWebhookUtil via GlideAjax; no processing script. Lab aid only; not part of the product.false
Knowledge 2026 Lab CCL6454 - This page is a lab aid for simulating third-party webhook deliveries to Spoke external triggers. It is not part of the product and must not be used in production instances.

Spoke Webhook Simulator

Acts as a proxy for DocuSign and GitHub, delivering signed or OAuth-authenticated webhook events directly to the corresponding Spoke external trigger endpoint on this instance.

DocuSign - Connection

GitHub - Connection

Used to compute the x-hub-signature-256 HMAC header.
Sets the x-github-event request header.
Sets the x-github-hook-id request header.

Additional Headers (optional, both providers)

JSON object of extra headers merged into the Spoke request. Leave blank to omit. Must be a valid flat JSON object, e.g. {"key":"value"}.

Webhook Payload

Response
